title: jasminum carinatum
intro: Jasminum carinatum, also known as the Cape jasmine or Chinese jasmine, is a flowering plant native to South Africa and widely cultivated for its ornamental value. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its chemical compounds such as flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Jasminum carinatum are said to include relief from stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as improved cardiovascular health and reduced inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its flowers in hot water or oil to create teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to promote relaxation and reduce symptoms of various health conditions.
